# kaleido_platform_connector_updates (Data Source)

Returns the list of pending template upgrades on a connector service (config types, connector flows, standard APIs whose templates have a newer version than what's deployed). Useful for surfacing drift in CI.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) Environment ID
- `service` (String) Connector service ID

### Read-Only

- `updates` (Attributes List) List of pending updates as reported by the connector manager. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--updates))

<a id="nestedatt--updates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `updates`

Read-Only:

- `applicable` (Boolean) True if the upgrade can be applied automatically. False means manual intervention is required.
- `current_version` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `latest_version` (String)
- `message` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `reason` (String)
- `reference_name` (String)
- `type` (String) Resource type: config_type, connector_flow, standard_api
